message: But yeah, I feel a lot lighter.
Oh, welcome back. I'm glad to see you again.
New flowers adorn the room, and there's a hint of spring in the air.
The room is thoroughly cleaned, creating a calming atmosphere. It feels different from before.
The slightly shy expression might be because they feel embarrassed about their past mental struggles.
You look well and it’s great to see you healthy.
I caused you trouble, didn't I?
Yeah, since I started counseling, it seems like the fog in my heart has cleared up.
I'm really sorry about the last time.
I mistook you for Guy, and it was pretty much...
Well, I was feeling kind of out of it.
Really? But now that I think about it, it's embarrassing.
I wonder how I ended up like that?
But, this isn't the first time something like this has happened.
Call me if something happens. Don't overthink it too much.
It's okay. For now, Günter is listening to everything.
I'm calmly waiting for Gai's message now. He'd want to reach out if we stay apart too long.
It's alright, as you can see, I'm strong.
Talking to Günter makes me feel better. I should have started counseling much earlier.
Call me if something happens. Don't overthink it too much.
It's okay. For now, Günter is listening to everything.
Well, even though it's 30 minutes, it’s pretty intensive. Since I’m being charged 100 dollars no matter how I spend it, I need to make it worthwhile.
That's quite a sum. Maybe I should have just listened for half that price.
It's not just listening. It’s counseling.
Anyway, from now on, I’ll be fine no matter what.
I haven't heard from Gai, but still,
it's good that he’s doing well.
I wonder if anyone knows where Gai went and when he will come back?
I feel relieved as it seems he’s returning to his former self. I deeply wish everything goes smoothly from here.
If I were to break up with Guy like this, everything might settle nicely.
